instruction:
Let $k$ be the value of
$$$\lfloor log_2 1 \rfloor + \lfloor log_2 2 \rfloor + \lfloor log_2 3 \rfloor + \dots + \lfloor log_2 2017 \rfloor+ \lfloor log_2 2018 \rfloor$$$
where $\lfloor m \rfloor$ denotes the integer part of $m$ (the biggest integer which is $\le m$ ).
What is the remainder when $k$ is divided by $1000$ ?
Problem

Options:
A. 142
B. 146
C. 141
D. 148
E. 144
F. 145
G. 143
H. 149
I. 147
J. 140
